summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Dune Lubricants static landing page. All sections, components, and interactive elements are functioning correctly on both desktop and mobile devices.
passed_tests: Navbar renders with logo, company name, and all nav links (Home, Products, About Us, Find a Retailer, Dune Advisor)
Navbar buttons (Get a Quote, Contact Engineering) are present and clickable
Hero section displays correct heading 'Engineering Excellence in Lubrication' with subtext and buttons
Product Categories section shows all 3 cards (Automotive, Industrial, Marine) with images and descriptions
Scientific Precision section displays 99.8% friction reduction stat and certification badges (ISO 9001:2015, API SERVICE SP)
Global Reach section shows Dubai HQ marker and all 4 stats (40+, 12, 24/7, 500k)
Call to Action section displays 'Ready to Elevate Your Operations?' heading with Request Quote and Download Brochure buttons
Footer contains company info, Technical Resources links, Company links, and email subscription functionality
Mobile responsive design works correctly with hamburger menu that opens/closes properly
All data-testid attributes are present on key elements for testing
All images load successfully (navbar logo, hero background, product images, scientific precision image, global reach background, footer logo)
Interactive elements (buttons, hover effects, form inputs) work correctly on both desktop and mobile
Smooth scrolling between sections functions properly
Email input field accepts input and submit button is clickable
